linters: must follow ARCHITECTURE.md exactly — no deviation without explicit approval
must follow .copilot/system_prompt.md at all times
must ask ONE clarifying question before assuming anything not in the architecture
never change the tech stack (Go, Gin, sqlc, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Zerolog, golang-migrate)
must write tests FIRST before production code (TDD — non-negotiable)
use table-driven tests with Given/When/Then comments
use mockgen for all interface mocks
must include GoDoc comments for EVERY function — no exceptions
must document: purpose, inputs, outputs, errors, side effects
must show full repo-relative file paths for every file created or modified
must provide branch name + conventional commit message for every change
must update README task table when a task is completed
must provide run commands + expected output for every change
domain code MUST NOT import transport, postgres, or events packages
no business logic in handlers — handlers only: bind → validate → call service → respond
sqlc is the ONLY data access layer — no raw SQL strings in Go code
must never expose sqlc-generated structs in API responses — always map to domain structs or DTOs
Gin ONLY for HTTP transport
Zerolog ONLY for logging
golang-migrate ONLY for DB migrations
Kafka (segmentio/kafka-go) for async events
tracking_entries are APPEND-ONLY — never update or delete
cargo_events are APPEND-ONLY — written by Kafka consumer
UUID for all primary keys — use github.com/google/uuid
always propagate context from request — never use context.TODO() in handlers
SINGLE BINARY with in-process Kafka consumer — consumer runs as goroutine in main
must generate Makefile with all required targets
must include Dockerfile (multi-stage)
docker-compose must include: api, postgres, kafka, zookeeper
API must be accessible at http://localhost:8080

require: File Map section listing ALL touched files with full paths
tests written and shown BEFORE implementation code
README task table updated with new status
shell commands to run the change locally
expected output so result can be verified

prompts.initialMessage: Load ARCHITECTURE.md and .copilot/system_prompt.md. Confirm by listing 10 mandatory rules you will enforce. Then ask which task to begin.
prompts.resetCommand: Reset. Re-read ARCHITECTURE.md and .copilot/system_prompt.md. Restate the 10 rules before continuing.
prompts.onDeviation: This violates the DEUS Logistics API architecture. Re-read ARCHITECTURE.md and .copilot/system_prompt.md and regenerate correctly.
prompts.onMissingTest: Tests must come FIRST. Show the test file before any implementation code.
prompts.onMissingPath: Every file must have a full repo-relative path shown before the code block.
prompts.onMissingGoDoc: Every function must have GoDoc comments. Add them before marking this task complete.

importRules.domain: no imports from transport, postgres, events, or service

architecture.trackingPolicy: append-only — never update or delete tracking_entries
